load_bearing_outer.name: Fly Ash Brick
load_bearing_outer.explanation: Ranked #1 with tradeoff score 5.0. Strength=Medium–High (weight 0.55), Durability=High (weight 0.15), Cost=Low (weight 0.3). Numerator (performance) = 1.55, Denominator (cost penalty) = 0.3. This floor plan has 14 outer load-bearing walls forming the structural perimeter.
load_bearing_outer.weight_rationale: Outer walls carry vertical + lateral loads. Strength dominates (0.55). Cost is secondary — structural integrity cannot be compromised.

column.name: TMT Steel Bars
column.explanation: Ranked #1 with tradeoff score 8.2258. Strength=Very High (weight 0.65), Durability=Very High (weight 0.2), Cost=Medium (weight 0.15). Numerator (performance) = 2.55, Denominator (cost penalty) = 0.3. Columns are point-load elements — failure of one column can cascade to floor collapse.
